title: Coord Faker
description: A client side fabric mod that alters your XYZ coordinates display and others
body:
## Coord Faker! **TURN OFF BACKGROUND BLUR IF YOU ARE ON 1.21.8 - 1.21** ![Accessibility settings screen with background blur turned off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a20bca6ff7ec9b2424b13e63de04f0a214534379.png)
**Coord faker 0.2.2 is available for 26.1.x and 1.21.x!** ### Get started Open the controls and keybinds menu to set the mod's keybind.
F6: Cycle through modes (Vanilla, Relative, Absolute, Zero).
F7: Open the menu set your custom offsets. ### Important Notes - **Safe to Use**: This mod is Client-Side only. It does NOT change your real location on the server or affect gameplay. It only "lies" to your F3 screen!
- **Compatibility**: This is an early Alpha project. It is currently NOT compatible with BetterF3 or other HUD-modifying mods.
- **Support for other mods?** If you need something more compatible, check out [definitelymycoords](https://modrinth.com/mod/definitelymycoords)! [1.21.4] This is a fun project, so please don't expect much content. :3
